[[File:Sacredness.svg|thumb|Diagram explaining sacredness and its opponent processing system. See [[Virtual Engine]] for more info]]
Sacredness is a transgressive phenomenon that engages in opponent processing to home against horror transgressively while invoking elements of it. It counters [[Absurdity]] and is the epitome of [[Enlensing]] and [[Perknowing]].

It is the [[greater booster shot]] against [[domicide]]

== References ==
[[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[sn:Sacredness]][[Category:Greater booster shots]]
[[Category:Domicide]]
[[Category:Ninefold vaccine]]
[[sn:Sacredness]][[Category:Sacredness]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
